sessionStart.bash: chub track hook session-start --agent copilot 2>/dev/null || true

sessionEnd.bash: chub track hook stop --agent copilot 2>/dev/null || true

userPromptSubmitted.bash: chub track hook prompt --agent copilot 2>/dev/null || true

preToolUse.bash: chub track hook pre-tool --agent copilot 2>/dev/null || true

postToolUse.bash: chub track hook post-tool --agent copilot 2>/dev/null || true
